Describe the sequence of text slides and visual demonstrations presented from the beginning of the video until the instructional list appears.
canonical_answer: At 0s, the website URL and description appear on a dark gradient; at 4s, the text changes to 'A Progression For' on a red background; at 12s, 'Step 1 The Pop' appears on red; at 14s, a child in a spider shirt stands by a garage; at 16s, a bulleted list of teaching instructions replaces the live action scene.
